raw.message: How Many Goals Can You Score in This Epic Football Game? ⚽️🏆

hook.summary: A corner kick in a Brazil vs Italy match is saved by the keeper, leading to a close-up of a disappointed player.
hook.visual_action: Corner kick, header, goalkeeper save, and a close-up reaction of a frustrated player.

scene_flow: Brazil vs Italy corner kick fails to score, showing player frustration.
Fast-paced gameplay montage showing successful goals and dribbling.
Brazil scores from a corner kick followed by a celebratory animation.
France misses a corner kick, showing a different player's frustration.
Final branding screen with the game logo and a download prompt.
on_screen_text: NOT ALL IMAGES ARE GAMEPLAY INCLUDES IN-GAME PURCHASES (INCLUDES RANDOM ITEMS)
audience_proxy: Casual sports fans who enjoy fast-paced, arcade-style soccer games.
